title: 13 Google tips for a fun, productive summer off from college
summary: Start by exploring tools like Gemini and Search to build application dashboards, practice interview skills, and create custom study guides. Use study notebooks in Gemini to prep for standardized tests, like the GRE (available in Gemini later this summer).
